name: libref-util-perl
title: libref-util-perl
summary: set of utility functions for checking references
description:
set of utility functions for checking references
Ref::Util introduces several functions to help identify references in a
faster and smarter way. In short:
.
ref $foo eq 'ARRAY'
# is now:
is_arrayref($foo)
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libref-util-perl because set of utility functions for checking references.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libref-util-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libref-util-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libref-util-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
